paths.name: classix
paths.message: Import { cx } from '#styles' instead. The barrel pins cx semantics so a future swap is one file.

patterns.message: Import from '@/shared/ui/*' instead. Direct Base UI imports are reserved for shared/ui wrappers so swapping the headless library stays a one-folder change.
Import a page slice by its root only (@/_pages/<slice>). Segment paths (ui/lib/model) are slice-private.

paths.name: classix
paths.message: Import { cx } from '#styles' instead. The barrel pins cx semantics so a future swap is one file.

patterns.message: Import from '@/shared/ui/*' instead. Direct Base UI imports are reserved for shared/ui wrappers so swapping the headless library stays a one-folder change.
Only route files (src/pages/) may import page slices. Lower layers never import upward, and page slices never import each other — duplicate small glue instead.
